value: The method proposed by FP Innovations is an empirical approach that accounts for the effects of multiple spans, toppings and non structural elements. Behind the method are laboratory studies on vibration performance of CLT.According to FP Innovations (CL7.3.1.2), the vibration performance can be improved for continuous spans and also with non structural elements that provide an enhanced stiffening effect, including partition walls, finishes and ceilings. Under such conditions, the vibration controlled span may be increased by up to 20% up to 8m. Refer to FP Innovations Vibration chapter for further information.
